title: While-true Sentinel
description: Create a while loop that stops when a specific number is reached.
problemStatement:
Sometimes you don't know the exact number of iterations. Create an `int count = 0`. Use a `while` loop to print `"Tick"` while `count < 3`. Be sure to increment your counter inside the loop.

**Expected Output:** 
`Tick` 
`Tick` 
`Tick`
hints: Don't forget `count++` or you'll get an infinite loop!
